summary: All 31 rows of the Numbers Reference Card verified against ground truth. Every code citation opened and confirmed at (or within a few lines of) the cited line: frames.py:855/856 (16000/24000), webrtc types.go:11-16 (48kHz/20ms Opus), twilio.py:255-258 (8kHz ulaw), base_transport.py:69 (audio_out_10ms_chunks=4 -> 40ms) and :72 (end_silence_secs=2), soxr_stream_resampler.py:27 (CLEAR_STREAM_AFTER_SECS=0.2), deepgram/stt.py:652-663 (10s idle / 5s keepalive), vad_analyzer.py:24-27 (0.7/0.2/0.2/0.6), gemini_live/llm.py:123 (DEFAULT_USER_AUDIO_PREROLL_SECS=0.5), base_smart_turn.py:27-29 (STOP_SECS=3/PRE_SPEECH_MS=500/MAX_DURATION=8), turn.py:117-125 (min_duration 0.5 / false_interruption_timeout 2.0 / backchannel_boundary (1.0,1.0)), defaults.ts:7-10 (THRESHOLD 0.5 / 0.025*2=25ms*2 / prefix 0.5), stream_pacer.py:20 (min_remaining_audio=5.0 / max_text_length=300), worker.py:87-88 (HEARTBEAT 1.0/10.0), base_input.py:31 (AUDIO_INPUT_TIMEOUT_SECS=0.5), websocket_service.py:35-36 (5.0s stable / 3 quick failures), network.py:11 (max_wait=10) and worker.py:1096 (min(retry_count*2,10)), worker.py:203 (drain_timeout=1800), stt/fallback_adapter.py:53 (attempt_timeout=10.0). The SmartTurn 'model cut 0.5' is in local_smart_turn_v3.py:174 (completion_prob>0.5), a sibling file in the same smart_turn package whose base file (:27) is cited for the 3s/500ms/8s constants; TURN-05 note confirms the '0.5 sigmoid cut and 3s silence net' pairing, so the grouping is internally consistent. Source-only flags are honest: RTF gauge (TTS-04) genuinely absent from pipecat/livekit metrics dirs (grep hits were test/plugin files, not RTF gauges); barge-in <100ms (BARGE-02) is Vapi-source-only, LiveKit/Pipecat do not measure it; human v2v ladder (LAT-03: 300/500/1200/1-2s) and budget split (LAT-04: ASR~300/LLM 200-900/TTS~400) and co-location (LAT-08: 75ms->5ms) all match their source notes exactly. Jitter buffer 'LiveKit 200ms cited in MOC' confirmed in wiki/xport-map.md (queue_size_ms=200) and matches TTS-07 (~100ms target). All 28 referenced note IDs exist under notes/ and support their rows. No MISALIGNED or MINOR findings.
